scope: Complete execution log of tranches T0-T11 from the program plan at .cursor/plans/ultraplan-11-runpod-full-integration_391d613d.plan.md

T0.summary: All four claimed truths verified: API key works, REST API works (pods/templates/endpoints 200), template 4dnxg7h6lw present as amof-mvp-pytorch-cuda121, pod lifecycle code importable and exercisable. No mutations.

T1.summary: Extended RunpodProfile with optional docker_args field; added gpt-oss-120b-vllm-single-h100 example profile; added operator driver script scripts/runpod_t1_drive.py; added runbook at docs/operations/runpod-t1-pod-proof-runbook.md. Actual pod creation is a separate operator-gated action (spends ~$2/h H100 time).

T2.summary: Promoted HeavyLaneProfile dataclass to YAML-backed catalog. Extended RunpodProfile with lane/routing fields (profile_kind, intended_roles, model, runtime, gpu_class, health_path, openai_base_url_template, max_context_tokens, idle_ttl_minutes, hard_timeout_seconds, max_cost_per_run_usd, hourly_cost_usd_cap, teardown_policy, applicability, required_secrets, allow_master, allow_direct_git_write). Added list_profiles() service helper + project_profile() projection. Added GET /api/v1/runpod/profiles endpoint. resolve_profile() now prefers .amof/runpod-profiles/runner_code_heavy.yaml; falls back to embedded defaults.
code_changes: repos/amof/scripts/amof/api/services/runpod.py: PROFILE_KINDS, TEARDOWN_POLICIES, ALLOWED_APPLICABILITIES; lane fields on RunpodProfile; list_profiles; project_profile

T3.summary: Added RunpodSiblingConflict error and sibling-pod refusal in create_pod (409 if same-profile pod is RUNNING/STARTING/RESUMING/PENDING). Added RunpodClient.resolve_endpoint, health_check_endpoint, mark_usable. Wired GET /api/v1/runpod/pods/{id}/health and POST /api/v1/runpod/pods/{id}/mark-usable.
code_changes: repos/amof/scripts/amof/api/services/runpod.py: RunpodSiblingConflict; sibling check; resolve_endpoint; health_check_endpoint; mark_usable

T4.summary: Added RunpodClient.garbage_collect (default dry_run=True). Catches EXITED/DEAD/TERMINATED/FAILED pods and pods past TTL by overshoot_seconds (default 3600). Added POST /api/v1/runpod/gc and POST /api/v1/runpod/ttl/enforce endpoints.

T5.summary: Added GPU_HOURLY_RATES_USD table aligned with program pricing snapshot. Added estimate_hourly_cost_usd and estimate_pod_uptime_cost_usd. Added RunpodBudgetCapExceeded (HTTP 402) + preflight in create_pod. profile projection now includes estimated_hourly_cost_usd.
code_changes: repos/amof/scripts/amof/api/services/runpod.py: GPU_HOURLY_RATES_USD, RunpodBudgetCapExceeded, estimate_hourly_cost_usd, estimate_pod_uptime_cost_usd, create_pod preflight

T6.summary: Added collect_runpod_activity helper that reads .amof/audit/runpod-pods.jsonl and summarizes per-op counts + events in a time window. _build_release_record now calls it for the current release window (between previous tag commit time and now). amof release <bump> now records runpod_activity in the release audit file alongside commit subjects and file lists.

T7.summary: Added strict mode to _resolve_runner_runpod_clients. When strict=True: (a) refuses if heavy-lane health not usable via evaluate_heavy_lane_status, (b) drops runners not in profile YAML's intended_roles, (c) refuses if profile declares allow_master=True. Production call site in run_agent_for_ui passes strict=True. Default strict=False preserves the existing Phase R1 test contract.
code_changes: repos/amof/scripts/amof/api/services/agent_runner.py: strict/health_status/profile_loader params; T7 refusal gates; call site strict=True

T8.summary: Added /runpod page with four readonly panels (Heavy lane health, Profile catalog, AMOF-managed pods, GC actions). Mutation buttons behind Dialog confirms: Stop (single confirm), Delete (destructive), Create pod (2-step confirm). Added useRunpod hook with typed data shapes. Added Server icon + sidebar nav entry gated by operatorOnly. No dashboards.

T9.summary: Added runpod-auth secret mount (api-key + openai-base-url) to values-cloud-dev.yaml controlPlane.secretEnv. Added runpod.lifecycleManagement values knob (default 'write' on local, 'readonly' on cloud-dev + prod-dev). Router _require_write_mode refuses mutating endpoints when AMOF_RUNPOD_LIFECYCLE_MANAGEMENT=readonly. Added runpod_probe() in runpod_heavy_lane.py implementing release-runtime-validation-gate.md §21-§23 exactly (GET /models only, never /chat/completions, structured pass/fail with failure_class).

T10.summary: Added long_context_reviewer profile targeting DeepSeek-V4-Flash on 2x H200. Tests pin that two profiles coexist without cross-state (sibling check scoped per-profile; list_amof_pods returns both).

T11.summary: Added profile_kind='serverless_openai_compatible'. Parse relaxed to accept template_id=None+image_name=None, gpu_count=0, container_disk_gb=0, cloud_type=SERVERLESS. Requires model + openai_base_url_template. create_pod raises RunpodProfileError if called with a serverless profile (no pod to create). UI distinguishes serverless rows with a badge and shows 'no pod' instead of create button. Example profile at runner_code_heavy_serverless.yaml.
code_changes: repos/amof/scripts/amof/api/services/runpod.py: serverless branch in parse_profile; create_pod refusal

test_summary.full_suite_note: The 15 test errors in the broader suite (test_api_health_routes etc.) are pre-existing ModuleNotFoundError for 'fastapi' in this python env; unchanged by this program.

new_api_endpoints: POST /api/v1/runpod/pods                 (existing; T3 sibling refusal + T5 cost preflight + T9 write-mode)
POST /api/v1/runpod/gc                   (T4 new; T9 write-mode when dry_run=false)
POST /api/v1/runpod/ttl/enforce          (T4 new; T9 write-mode when dry_run=false)
new_guardrails: T3 sibling-pod refusal (409): same-profile live pod refuses new create
T5 hourly budget cap (402): gpu_class rate * gpu_count must fit under hourly_cost_usd_cap
T7 strict routing: agent_runner refuses RunPod client when health unusable, role not in intended_roles, or profile allows master
T9 readonly lifecycle: AMOF_RUNPOD_LIFECYCLE_MANAGEMENT=readonly refuses mutations on cloud-dev/prod-dev
T11 serverless no-pod: create_pod refuses serverless profile_kind
mutations_performed: repo code: runpod.py, runpod_heavy_lane.py, routers/runpod.py, agent_runner.py, commands/release.py
repo docs: 4 profile YAML examples + T1 runbook
repo UI: useRunpod hook + /runpod page + sidebar nav
ecosystem audit: T0 + T1 + this closeout
operator_followups: Run T1 operator driver (scripts/runpod_t1_drive.py) to convert 'artifacts ready' into 'pod-based endpoint proven' with real /models 200
After T1 success, set RUNPOD_OPENAI_BASE_URL in .env and confirm GET /api/v1/runpod/heavy-lane/health reports status:usable
Create runpod-auth secret in cloud-dev k8s when ready for Phase B/C cloud-dev RunPod consumption
Copy .amof/runpod-profiles/runner_code_heavy.yaml from the docs example so heavy-lane health resolves from disk
